title: dischisma ciliatum
intro: Dischisma ciliatum, a type of succulent plant, is a genus of flowering plants in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. The medicinal properties of Dischisma ciliatum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using Dischisma ciliatum include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dischisma ciliatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in South Africa where it is native.
